default_off_evidence: V8 — flush_state() returns False; no file IO; no companion.preference_persisted emits when state_cache_path is None

fix_1_bump_comfort_prefer.change: 首次 capture（_original_prefer is None）也把 current 减去 comfort keys 当 baseline；contaminated 时 warn-once（_warned_first_capture_contaminated 标志位）。关闭 companion-010 inherited caveat。

fix_2_preference_learner_persist.change: 新增 cross-process state cache：模块级 _load_preference_state / _atomic_write_preference_state（schema v1, version+saved_at+profiles, atomic tmp+rename）；__init__ 接 state_cache_path（None 时完全 OFF）；构造期 hydrate + emit `companion.preference_persisted` action=load；rebuild_for_profile 末尾同步 _state_cache 并 flush + emit action=save；新 helpers preference_persist_enabled_from_env / preference_persist_path_from_env / get_cached_topics / flush_state。
fix_2_preference_learner_persist.env: 新 COCO_PREFERENCE_PERSIST=1 启用，COCO_PREFERENCE_PATH 覆盖路径（默认 data/preference_learner_state.json）

caveats: 无新 caveat（首次 capture 修复关闭 companion-010 inherited caveat；新 cache 机制为附加 default-OFF feature，未替换既有 persist_store 行为）
